name: The Martine Inn Butter Bran Muffins
directions: Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
Add all the remaining ingredients; mix well.
Cover and store in the refrigerator until ready to bake.
To bake:  preheat oven to 400F and line muffin cups with papers.
Do not stir batter after being chilled; scoop batter from the top.
Fill prepared muffin pans 2/3 full and bake for 15 minutes or until golden.

name: Doggy Muffins
directions: Pre-heat oven to 450 degrees.
Grease muffin tins if not using paper liners.
In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients.
In a small bowl, mix together the milk and egg.
Pour the milk/egg mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until moistened.
Spoon batter into prepared muffin tins, filling each half full.
Bake 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Let rest in tins for 5 minutes, then finish cooling on cooling rack.
Makes 12-15 muffins.
NOTE: You can vary this recipe by adding some bacon bits and/or sprinkling shredded cheese on top of muffins during last 5 minutes of cooking time.

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats
The Martine Inn Butter Bran Muffins

name: Mama Smith's Hush Puppies
directions: Sift dry ingredients.
Add onion, egg, and creamed corn.
Use milk to thin mixture until it is pasty.
Stir well.
Deep fry until browned on all sides.

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Mojos
directions: 1. Combine poultry seasoning, kosher salt, flour, and bread crumbs.
2. Cut potatoes into 1/4 inch slices.
3. Wisk together milk and egg.
4. Coat each potato slice with egg and milk mixture.
5. Dredge each slice in crumb mixture and seat aside on a plate to rest.
6. Add directly to 370 degree F oil and fry until golden brown.

I wait to make this until I have slightly older oil as this this recipe completely ruins the oil afterward with the amount of flour in the recipe.  The oil is usually brown after I make these.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Passionfruit Butter
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a glass bowl.
Place bowl over a pot of boiling water, but don't let the base touch the water.
Stir constantly until a thick custard like consistancy is reached.
Let cool and place in a container, or place in hot steralised jars for longer shelf life.

similar.name: The Martine Inn Butter Bran Muffins

name: Egg Noodles
directions: Sift flour with salt.
Make a well in the center of flour.
add beaten eggs and water.
Mix with a fork in to a ball.
Roll out as thin as possible on floured surface, let dry.
Roll sheet up tightly and slice with a knife.
Separate strands of noodles
Combine with your favorite soup and cook for 10 to 12 minute.

name: Milk Bone Dog Biscuits
directions: 1. Variation: increase margarine to 1/2 cup and add 2 teaspoons sugar.
2. In large bowl pour hot water over the margarine.
3. Stir in powdered milk, salt, and egg. Add flour, 1/2 cup at a time.
4. Knead for a few minutes to form stiff dough.
5. Pat or roll to 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut into bone shapes.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 50 minutes. Cool. They will dry out quite hard.

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Beer Batter
directions: In a large mixing bowl blend beer, soy sauce, 2 tbsp oil, ginger, garlic, sugar, salt and pepper.  Add in the chicken pieces and mix well.  Let the mixture stand for 1 hour and longer.
In a mixing bowl blend flour, cornstarch, egg and ice cold water into a thick batter.  Let this set for 30 minutes before using.

name: Phyllis Emery's Homemade Egg Noodles
directions: Combine egg,salt, and milk.
Add enough flour to make the dough stiff - do NOT add all the flour at once.
Roll very thin on floured surface.
Let stand 20 minutes.
Roll up loosely.
Slice 1/4 inch wide.
Unroll and spread out.
Let dry 2 hours.
Drop into boiling salted water, soup, or broth.
Cook uncovered 10 minutes.

name: Cranberry and Sage Stuffing
directions: 1) In a large bowl, tear bread into small pieces.
2) Add in all other ingredients and mix together, by hand, until well blended.
3) Stuff into turkey/chicken right before cooking.
or.
place in a greased, 9x13 inch baking dish, cover with foil, and cook for 30-40 minutes at 350 degrees.

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Bran and Carrot Muffins
directions: Cream the egg and sugar.
Add the oil, vanilla and milk. Beat well.
Add the flour, salt , bran and bicarbonate of soda. Mix.
Add the raisins.
Leave to stand overnight.
Stir in the morning.
Bake at 180C for 20 minutes.
Variations: Add grated carrots, grated apple or nuts You can add apple puree in place of half of the milk.

similar.name: The Martine Inn Butter Bran Muffins
Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Baked Fish With Barbecue Sauce
directions: Saute onion and green pepper in oil in a heavy saucepan till tender. Stir in  tomato sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice and Worcestershire sauce. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat, and simmer 15 min., stirring occasionally.

Place fish fillets in a greased 12 x 7 x 2 in baking dish. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Spoon sauce on top and bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 10-15 min., or till fish flakes easily with a fork.

similar.name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats

name: Homemade Fettuccini Pasta Dough
directions: In a small bowl, whisk the first six ingredients. On a clean work surface, mix the all-purpose and semolina flours, forming a mound. Make a large well in the center. Pour egg mixture into the well. Using a fork or fingers, gradually mix flour mixture into egg mixture, forming a soft dough (the dough will be slightly sticky).
Lightly dust work surface with flour: knead dough gently five times. Shape into a round and divide into six wedges - like a pie.
Shape wedges into balls. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest for 30 minutes.
Roll each ball into a 10x8 inches rectangle, dusting lightly with flour as you go.
Roll up jelly-roll style.
Cut into 1/4 in.-wide strips. Cook in boiling water 1-3 minutes, until al-dente.

name: Sugar Bread
directions: enter all dry ingredients into the bowl.
mix together.
enter wet ingredients one at a time.
mix well.
pour into pan of choice.
bake until done.

similar.name: The Martine Inn Butter Bran Muffins

name: Easy Bake Five Ingredient Savory Dog Treats
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a medium mixing bowl, whisk together egg and chicken broth.
Add finely shredded carrots and bacon bits (optional). Mix well.
Add flour and mix into dough.
Flour your work surface and roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shape and place on a large baking sheet.
Bake for 40 min at 350°F.
Let cool before feeding to your dog. Then enjoy!
